nasb.text: Jesus *said to him, “Go; your son lives.” The man believed the word that Jesus spoke to him and started off.

esv.text: Jesus said to him, “Go; your son will live.” The man believed the word that Jesus spoke to him and went on his way.

cnv.text: 耶穌告訴他：“回去吧，你的兒子好了。”那人信耶穌對他說的話，就回去了。

ccb.text: 耶稣说：“回去吧，你的儿子好了。”他相信耶稣的话，就回去了。

csbs.text: 耶稣对他说：“你回去吧，你的儿子活了！”那人相信耶稣的话，就回去了。
